list.name: Changes
list.comment: (change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions

task.summary:
fix: resolve all known bugs and complete missing infrastructure
Core fixes: - Fix LineEffect direction vector (fromVector instead of fromLocation on getDirection()) - Fix HelixEffect import in EffectRegistry (effects.trace, not effects.motion) - Remove sealed/permits from EffectHandle (cross-module sealed types don't compile) - Fix ManagedHandle race condition: convert record to class with AtomicBoolean one-shot flag - Fix ModifiedEffect Java 21 reflection: walk hierarchy via getDeclaredField + setAccessible - Fix EarthEffect cache accumulation: separate distortion pass from sphere generation - Fix EquationTransform thread safety: replace synchronized with ThreadLocal<Expression>
Event wiring: - Fire EffectPlayEvent in AbstractEffect.play() with CountDownLatch for async callers - Fire EffectCancelEvent in EffectRunner.cancel() with COMPLETED/CANCELLED/ERROR reasons - EffectRunner.cancel() now accepts a CancelReason overload; markDone() passes COMPLETED
Infrastructure: - Add ConfigManager: loads all config.yml keys into typed fields, wired into boot() - EffectBuilder.visibleRange now reads ConfigManager.defaultVisibleRange() at init time - PaperParticleSpawner respects forceShowParticles and client render-distance filter from config - EffectManager enforces maxActiveEffects cap from config, drops excess with fine log - EffectManager implements Listener to auto-remove ignored players on PlayerQuitEvent - EffectManager.dispose() calls HandlerList.unregisterAll to clean up listener registration - Add ParticleLibCommand: info/list/play/reload subcommands with tab completion - Wire command executor and tab completer in ParticleLib.onEnable() - ParticleLib.api() service-manager fallback guarded for shaded mode compatibility - boot() now calls ConfigManager.reload() before registry and API init
(change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions
(change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions
(change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions

MESSAGE.value:
fix: resolve all known bugs and complete missing infrastructure
Core fixes: - Fix LineEffect direction vector (fromVector instead of fromLocation on getDirection()) - Fix HelixEffect import in EffectRegistry (effects.trace, not effects.motion) - Remove sealed/permits from EffectHandle (cross-module sealed types don't compile) - Fix ManagedHandle race condition: convert record to class with AtomicBoolean one-shot flag - Fix ModifiedEffect Java 21 reflection: walk hierarchy via getDeclaredField + setAccessible - Fix EarthEffect cache accumulation: separate distortion pass from sphere generation - Fix EquationTransform thread safety: replace synchronized with ThreadLocal<Expression>
Event wiring: - Fire EffectPlayEvent in AbstractEffect.play() with CountDownLatch for async callers - Fire EffectCancelEvent in EffectRunner.cancel() with COMPLETED/CANCELLED/ERROR reasons - EffectRunner.cancel() now accepts a CancelReason overload; markDone() passes COMPLETED
Infrastructure: - Add ConfigManager: loads all config.yml keys into typed fields, wired into boot() - EffectBuilder.visibleRange now reads ConfigManager.defaultVisibleRange() at init time - PaperParticleSpawner respects forceShowParticles and client render-distance filter from config - EffectManager enforces maxActiveEffects cap from config, drops excess with fine log - EffectManager implements Listener to auto-remove ignored players on PlayerQuitEvent - EffectManager.dispose() calls HandlerList.unregisterAll to clean up listener registration - Add ParticleLibCommand: info/list/play/reload subcommands with tab completion - Wire command executor and tab completer in ParticleLib.onEnable() - ParticleLib.api() service-manager fallback guarded for shaded mode compatibility - boot() now calls ConfigManager.reload() before registry and API init
(change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: (change): removed unused config keys... maybe in future versions
